articles.headline: Pep Guardiola: 'Bit weird' that Man City are playing Real Madrid again
articles.description: Manchester City boss Pep Guardiola admits it feels "a little bit weird" to be facing Real Madrid in the Champions League yet again.

images.alt: Pep Guardiola: 'Bit weird' that Man City are playing Real Madrid again

articles.headline: Wolves move past PL record-low points total with win over Aston Villa
articles.description: Wolves moved past Derby's record-low Premier League points tally as they dealt a blow to Aston Villa's top-four hopes with a 2-0 win at Molineux.

images.alt: Wolves move past PL record-low points total with win over Aston Villa

gmStry.hdln: Fofana sees red as Chelsea draw with Burnley
gmStry.desc: Chelsea's 10 men were stunned by a Zian Flemming header in the third minute of added time as Burnley stole a 1-1 draw at Stamford Bridge.

allCommentary.dtls: Attempt missed. Liam Delap (Chelsea) right footed shot from outside the box is too high. Assisted by Josh Acheampong.

keyEvents.dtls: Kickoff
Goal! Chelsea 1, Burnley 0. João Pedro (Chelsea) left footed shot from very close range to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Pedro Neto.
Hannibal Mejbri (Burnley) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Wesley Fofana (Chelsea) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Halftime
Substitution, Burnley. Lucas Pires replaces Kyle Walker.
keyEvents.shrtDtls: On: Lucas Pires | Off: Kyle Walker

keyEvents.dtls: Substitution, Burnley. James Ward-Prowse replaces Lesley Ugochukwu.
keyEvents.shrtDtls: On: James Ward-Prowse | Off: Lesley Ugochukwu

keyEvents.dtls: Second yellow card to Wesley Fofana (Chelsea) for a bad foul.
Substitution, Chelsea. Tosin Adarabioyo replaces Cole Palmer.
keyEvents.shrtDtls: On: Tosin Adarabioyo | Off: Cole Palmer

keyEvents.dtls: Substitution, Burnley. Jacob Bruun Larsen replaces Josh Laurent.

keyEvents.dtls: Robert Sánchez (Chelsea) is shown the yellow card.
Goal! Chelsea 1, Burnley 1. Zian Flemming (Burnley) header from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by James Ward-Prowse with a cross following a corner.
Josh Laurent (Burnley) is shown the yellow card.
Jorrel Hato (Chelsea) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Second Half ends, Chelsea 1, Burnley 1.
